title: TaxCalculation
description: Per-invoice-line tax computation record. IMMUTABLE audit trail. Carries `tenant_id` + `invoice_line_id`. Freezes tax_rate_snapshot + exemption_applied at calculation time — rate changes AFTER invoice issuance NEVER retroactively re-tax historical invoices. NEVER carries `application_id`, `region_id`, `organization_id`, or `scope_node_id`.

invoice_line_id.description: The invoice line being taxed. RESTRICT — a line with a calculation cannot be hard-deleted. NULL for real-time preview calculations that were persisted with metadata.persist_preview=true (rare).

source_amount_cents.description: Pre-tax amount. May be negative for refund tax reversals.

tax_amount_cents.description: Computed tax. Negative when source_amount_cents is negative (refund reversal).

tax_rate_snapshot.description: FROZEN AT CALCULATION TIME. Shape: { rate_id, percentage, jurisdiction: { id, country_code, state_code }, rate_type, applies_to, effective_at }. IMMUTABLE — this is the load-bearing invariant of the module.

exemption_applied.description: FROZEN AT CALCULATION TIME when an exemption was applied. Shape: { exemption_id, certificate_number (redacted), exemption_type, issuing_jurisdiction_id, valid_from, valid_until }. Null when no exemption applied.

provider.description: Enum: taxjar / avalara / stripe_tax / native_calculator / custom_webhook.

provider_transaction_id.description: Provider-side reference (e.g. TaxJar tax_id, Avalara transaction docCode, Stripe Tax calculation ID). Null for NativeCalculator (no external reference).

provider_metadata.description: Additional provider response context: nexus applied (US Wayfair), per-jurisdiction breakdown (Canadian federal + provincial), latency_ms, provider API version.

calculated_at.description: Immutable timestamp — regulator audit. Not updatable.

metadata.description: Includes correlation_id (request-scoped tracing), frozen_by_payment (defense-in-depth marker set on transaction::PaymentCaptured).

certificate_number.description: REDACTED on egress except for admin/owner roles

x-invariants: IMMUTABLE after commit — no soft-delete, no updates, no deletes
tax_rate_snapshot is FROZEN JSONB (the load-bearing invariant of the module)
exemption_applied is FROZEN JSONB when set
source_currency present when source_amount_cents present (both always required together)
calculated_at is set on create + immutable
hard-deletion is FORBIDDEN — calculations migrate to tax_calculations_archive at 7 years (10 for Enterprise) via PurgeExpiredCalculationsJob
TenantErased cascade migrates rows to archive BEFORE FK CASCADE fires (MigrateCalculationsToArchiveOnTenantErased priority-20 hook)
